title: Repurposing Long-Form Video Content for Answer Engines
excerpt: Don't let your webinars and podcasts go to waste. Learn how to slice long-form video into bite-sized AEO assets that dominate specific query segments.
author: Corey Spicer
content:
A 60-minute webinar might contain 40 brilliant answers to specific customer questions, but an Answer Engine won't easily parse an hour of unbroken audio.

The Micro-Content Strategy

Identify the key questions answered in your long-form content. Cut these out into standalone 30-90 second clips. Upload these individually with targeted titles, descriptions, and transcripts. Suddenly, one webinar becomes an arsenal of 40 highly optimized AEO assets.
